children.text: Getting rid of the invasive weeds
On Saturday, about 25 volunteers showed up at McClellen Ranch Park to clean up after the storms. This benefited this lovely park by removing invasive weeds that were crowding out native plants.
300+ Volunteers Clean up San Tomas Park

On Martin Luther King Jr. day January 16, 300+ volunteers showed up at San Tomas Park to remove trash and distribute 125 cubic yards of Fibar, trim overgrowth and plant 45 rose bushes. This benefited the community by providing a great park; especially for children to play.
Great American Litter Pick Up at Hamann Park

On 4/22/17, dozens of volunteers came to Hamann Park to join volunteers across the nation in keeping our communities clean. This benefited our community by providing cleaner neighborhoods around Hamann Park.
Great American Litter Pick-up at Starbird Park

On 4/22/17, 14 members of our church and many other volunteers showed up at Starbird Park to clean up litter in the park and surrounding neighborhood. This benefited our community by providing a pleasant place for picnics and play.
